basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Delhi is recruiting 1 post of Project Technical Support-III. Interview date will be communicated to shortlisted candidates.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 35 years | other benefits: Possibility to register for Ph.D.
qualification.education_qualification: For Sciences: Three Years Graduate + three years experience or PG in relevant field. For Engineering: First Class Four Years Graduate Degree + three years experience or PG in relevant field.

vacancy_details.details: Total 01 vacancy for Project Technical Support-III.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview. No TA/DA will be paid. Final selection is subject to verification of documents.
how_to_apply: Prepare a single PDF containing filled form, CV, and self-attested copies of certificates.
Email it to [email protected] by 21 July 2026.
Mention the post applied for clearly in the email.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date via email.
important_instructions: Appointment is purely contractual and co-terminus with the project. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process. Selected candidates may register for Ph.D. as per NIT Delhi rules. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Interview will be conducted in offline mode only.

NIT Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total 01 vacancy for Project Technical Support-III.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: For Sciences: Three Years Graduate + three years experience or PG in relevant field. For Engineering: First Class Four Years Graduate Degree + three years experience or PG in relevant field.
Experience in optics/prototyping of optical instrumentation/spectrometer, Machine Learning, MATLAB, Python, designing of metamaterial using Lumerical, COMSOL, CST etc.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Remuneration Details
NIT Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be called for Offline Interview. No TA/DA will be paid. Final selection is subject to verification of documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Delhi Project Technical Support-III 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should: Fill the attached application form. Prepare a single PDF containing filled form, CV, and self-attested copies of certificates. Email it to [email protected] by 21 July 2026. Mention the post applied for clearly in the email. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date via email.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Delhi Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely contractual and co-terminus with the project. The Institute reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process. Selected candidates may register for Ph.D. as per NIT Delhi rules. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Interview will be conducted in offline mode only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Delhi PTS-III 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 21 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Technical Support-III at NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Rs. 28,000 + 30% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for NIT Delhi PTS-III post?
faq.answer: Three years Graduate + experience or PG degree in relevant Science/Engineering field.

faq.question: Q4. Is PhD registration possible for selected candidates at NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a possibility for the candidate to register for Ph.D.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for NIT Delhi ICMR recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: “AI-Assisted Anemia Diagnosis: Integrating metasurface holography and spectroscopy for Automated, label free screening”.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Delhi Project Technical Support-III vacancy?
faq.answer: Fill the application form and send it along with CV and certificates in a single PDF to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for NIT Delhi PTS-III position?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years.

faq.question: Q8. Is experience in optics and machine learning required for NIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: It is highly desirable. Candidates with experience in MATLAB, Python, Lumerical, COMSOL etc. will be preferred.

faq.question: Q9. Will the interview for NIT Delhi PTS-III be online or offline?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted in offline mode only.

faq.question: Q10. Is the NIT Delhi Project Technical Support position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely on contract basis till the completion of the project.
